_comment: Okta directory export (as an Okta/Entra admin-API sync would produce). The IdP is internet-facing (SSO portal). The federated_roles are AWS role ARNs that converge with the roles the IAM collector discovered (iam-sample.json) - so federating into them inherits their privesc. alice has NO MFA and federates into admin-role (AdministratorAccess): the modern kill chain internet -> Okta -> alice -> admin-role -> account-admin lights up, highly traversable because there's no MFA to phish past. bob has MFA and only a privesc-capable role, so his path is discounted.
